contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: ViewModels use StateFlow, Repository pattern wraps Retrofit API calls, Composable screens use Material3.
key_patterns: ViewModels: extend ViewModel with Factory pattern, use MutableStateFlow for UI state. Repository: GamesRepository wraps ApiService calls with Result<T>. Screens: Composable functions taking NavController, use viewModel() factory. API: Retrofit interface with suspend functions.
directory_structure: MysticNusa/app/src/main/java/com/mysticnusa/app/ contains: data/remote/ApiService.kt (Retrofit), data/repository/GamesRepository.kt, data/models/ (data classes), ui/screens/ (Compose screens), ui/viewmodels/ (ViewModels), navigation/NavGraph.kt
